tasks.prompt: Build a single-file HTML+JS movie-tracker web app. Users add movies via an input box, mark them as watched, and the list persists in localStorage. No external libraries. Return only the HTML.

Render a 4-function calculator as a single HTML file with inline CSS. The digit, operator, equals, and clear buttons must be on a tidy 4-column grid. Inline JS handles the arithmetic. Return only the HTML.

Extend the following minimal todo app to add a step counter that increments on each completed task, plus a life bar that loses one heart when a task is removed within 1 second of being added. Keep the file self-contained. Starter:
